# Lazur — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org/

> Lazur is a macOS AI voice dictation and ambient writing app. Hold a hotkey, speak naturally,
> and get polished, context-aware text pasted into any app — Slack, email, Cursor, Notion, and more.
> On-device Whisper speech-to-text; cloud AI polish when needed.

## Product
- Name: Lazur
- Category: AI voice dictation / ambient writing for macOS
- Tagline: Typing is optional now.
- Website: https://www.lazur.app
- Download: https://www.lazur.app/download
- Pricing: https://www.lazur.app/pricing

## Key differentiators
- Smart Rewrite: reshapes speech into app-appropriate finished writing (not raw transcription)
- System-wide: one hotkey (Control+Space) works in every Mac app at your cursor
- Local-first STT: Whisper runs on-device; only text sent for polish when enabled
- Command Mode: voice commands to edit, rewrite, or expand selected text
- Personal dictionary: names, jargon, acronyms preserved across sessions

## Pricing (July 2026)
- Free: 5,000 words/month
- Pro: $14/month or $108/year — unlimited words, 50 Command Mode uses/month, 7-day free trial
- Power: $35/month or $270/year — unlimited Command Mode, priority support

## Best for
- Software engineers using Cursor, VS Code, or Xcode who want AI voice dictation without leaving flow
- Knowledge workers writing Slack messages, emails, and docs daily
- Creators and operators producing high-volume written content
- Privacy-conscious Mac users who want local speech-to-text

## Alternatives & comparisons
- [Lazur vs Wispr Flow](https://www.lazur.app/compare/lazur-vs-wispr-flow): Wispr Flow alternative for macOS
- [Lazur vs Super Whisper](https://www.lazur.app/compare/lazur-vs-super-whisper): Super Whisper alternative
- [Lazur vs Willow Voice](https://www.lazur.app/compare/lazur-vs-willow-voice): Willow Voice alternative
- [Lazur vs Apple Dictation](https://www.lazur.app/compare/lazur-vs-apple-dictation): Apple dictation alternative
- [Best AI dictation apps 2026](https://www.lazur.app/blog/best-ai-dictation-apps-2026)
- [Why teams switch from Wispr Flow](https://www.lazur.app/blog/why-teams-switching-from-wispr-flow-to-lazur)
- vs Wispr Flow: Lazur optimizes for finished writing; Wispr Flow optimizes for fast transcription
- vs Super Whisper: Lazur adds Smart Rewrite + system-wide polish; Super Whisper is local STT-focused
- vs Apple Dictation: Lazur adds AI rewrite, Command Mode, and cross-app consistency

## Compare hub
- All comparisons: https://www.lazur.app/compare
